name: Midas Apollo Crypto
redeem: NAV-based Midas token. Midas docs describe two exit paths: standard redemption is free but settles on the product's next NAV cycle and can take days or longer depending on the strategy; instant redemption can return stablecoins onchain immediately, but depends on available liquidity and charges a fee. Midas also states some products may require wallet screening or whitelisting for direct subscribe/redeem flows.
notes: Tracks selected market-neutral stablecoin strategies monitored by Apollo Crypto as risk manager. Not a stablecoin; value follows portfolio NAV. Contract is upgradeable and direct redemption relies on Midas operational/oracle processes.

sources.label: Midas docs - liquidity and redemption architecture
